name: Sequence Markets
long_description:
Sequence Markets is building the execution layer for digital assets.

Digital-asset liquidity is fragmented across centralized and decentralized venues. This creates inconsistent execution outcomes and operational complexity for active traders.

We are building execution infrastructure focused on routing quality and reliability across fragmented market structure.

Rollout policy:
- controlled rollouts
- quality over quantity
- open to retail and institutional traders
one_liner: Execution layer for fragmented digital-asset markets.
